titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NLS Adv. MS 15.1.18, no. 10

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=4 status=live modified=2021-01-26 06:57:39.563409+00 | translation moa=3 status=live modified=2022-02-15 08:50:19.330973+00

p.cl: Omnibus Sancte matris ecclesie filiis . Arnaldus . dei gratia ecclesie Sancti Andree apostoli humilis minister . salutem .

Ad pontificalem
spectat sollicitudinem paci prouidere religiosorum . ut qui intus deo uacant  exterioribus uexationibus non premantur .

Hac consideratione
ducti  quieci canonicorum in ecclesia beati Andree apostoli deo seruientium in posterum consulentes  omnem oblationem altaris sui quam
in septem partes diuisam persone septem non communiter uiuentes quondam tenuerint  predictis canonicis regularem uitam professis ⁊ in commune
degentibus  totam integram illibatamque rationabili prouisione ⁊ neccessaria  concedendam . esse . decreuimus . Quoniam qui altari deseruiunt  de alta
rio uiuere debent . neque secundum regulas decretales ibi oblationum portiones fieri debent . ubi communitas uiuentium  unum
facit quodammodo omne quod possidetur .

Itaque prenominatis canonicis omnem oblationem altaris cui deseruiunt  quietam ⁊ liberam ⁊ sine
partium distributione concedimus . ⁊ presentis scripti pagina perpetuo iure tenendam confirmamus .

T . his . W . morauiensi
episcopo sedis apostolice legato . Gregorio Duncheldensi episcopo . Andrea cathenensi . Samsone Brechensi . episcopis . Gaufrido . Abbate de Dunf’. W . abbate de mailr’. Al
uredo abbate de Striuel’ . Ysaac priore de scon’ . W . priore de chelh’ . Matheo archidiacono . Tor’ archidiacono . laodon’ . Magistro Andrea . Magistro
Herberto . Roberto Cancellario episcopi filio Seulf’ . Rogero capellano de pert . Nicholao camerario regis . Ricardo . capellano regis . Serlone clerico . Dauid
olif’ . ferthet comite de Strathern . Malcolmo comite de hathoth’ . Gillebrid’ Comite de hanagus . Dunecano comite de fif . Merle
Swano . Neis filio Willelmi . Stephano clerico .
To all sons of Holy Mother Church, Arnald by the grace of God humble servant of the church of Saint Andrew the apostle, sends greeting.
It belongs to a bishop’s duty to have a care for the peace of those who live according to a monastic rule, so that those who rest in God within are not burdened by troubles without.

Guided by this consideration, and having regard for the peace of the canons who will in the future serve God in the church of blessed Andrew the apostle, we have decreed that every offering of their altar which the seven parsons not living in community formerly held, which is divided into seven parts, is to be granted to the aforesaid canons who have professed a regular life and live in community, whole, entire and complete, with reasonable and necessary provision. For, those who serve at the altar ought to live of the altar, and according to the rules of the decretals, portions ought not to be made of the offerings where the community of the living makes a unity of all that is possessed.

And so we grant to the aforenamed canons every offering of the altar at which they serve, quit and free and without disbursement of parts. And by the writing of the present page we confirm what is to be held by perpetual right.
